title: Retail Manager - Travel Retail APAC
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Caudalie is a unique story of love, nature, passion, chance encounters and a sense of adventure! Founded in 1995 by Mathilde and Bertrand Thomas, Caudalie has grown into a leading French natural skincare brand known for its patented grape‑derived active ingredients. Headquartered in Paris and employing between 1,500 people worldwide, the company is committed to creating effective, clean, and sustainable skincare while maintaining strong environmental values, including being a proud “1% for the Planet” member since 2012. We are expanding our teams in our Singapore regional office, join us!

Job Summary

Caudalie Travel Retail is seeking a Retail Manager APAC to lead retail excellence and strengthen brand presence across APAC Travel Retail. This role drives retail operations, project coordination with key retailers, and best-in-class in-store execution, requiring frequent regional business travel.

Responsibilities

  • Lead retail operations across APAC Travel Retail to ensure compliance with brand standards and drive consistent retail excellence
  • Coordinate and manage retail projects with key retailers, ensuring timely and successful execution of store openings and activations
  • Analyze retail performance metrics such as SISO, KPIs, and productivity per BA to develop and implement targeted action plans that enhance performance across all points of sale
  • Facilitate effective communication and collaboration between internal teams and external retail partners to align objectives and execution
  • Monitor and manage retail budgets, ensuring all projects and activations adhere to approved financial plans
  • Analyze retail performance data and generate actionable insights through presentations and reports for management and stakeholders
  • Conduct regular store visits to assess execution quality, merchandising standards, and staff engagement, ensuring alignment with brand expectations
  • Support and deliver training initiatives to retail teams to enhance customer experience and staff capabilities

Required competencies and certifications

  • Fluent in English (mandatory) and proficient in Chinese to effectively communicate across the APAC region
  • Strong analytical skills to interpret retail data and KPIs for performance improvement
  • Proficient in MS Excel, Word, and PowerPoint for data analysis and reporting
  • Comfortable with frequent business travel across APAC to maintain field presence and stakeholder engagement

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in Business, Marketing, or related field
  • 2–3 years of retail management experience, preferably within the beauty industry
  • Excellent presentation and communication skills to influence and engage diverse stakeholders
